sqlMap.select: SELECT M.ID AS MEMBERID, M.NAME AS MEMBERNAME, P.ID AS POSTID, P.NAME AS POSTNAME, U.ID AS DEPTID, U.NAME AS DEPTNAME, ORG_POST_ID FROM ORG_MEMBER M INNER JOIN ORG_UNIT U ON M.ORG_DEPARTMENT_ID = U.ID INNER JOIN ORG_POST P ON M.ORG_POST_ID = P.ID INNER JOIN ORG_POST P ON M.ORG_POST_ID = P.ID WHERE ORG_DEPARTMENT_ID = #dept# AND ORG_POST_ID IN ( SELECT T1.* FROM VM_DEPTPOST, TABLE (UTIL_COMMON.SPLIT(POSTSCOPE, ',')) T1 WHERE BUSIMODEL = #busiModel# AND QUESTNAME = #questName#) AND M.STATE = 1 AND M.IS_ADMIN = 0 AND M.IS_ENABLE = 1

SELECT count(*) FROM ORG_MEMBER M INNER JOIN ORG_UNIT U ON M.ORG_DEPARTMENT_ID = U.ID INNER JOIN ORG_POST P ON M.ORG_POST_ID = P.ID WHERE ORG_DEPARTMENT_ID = #dept# AND ORG_POST_ID IN ( SELECT T1.* FROM VM_DEPTPOST, TABLE (UTIL_COMMON.SPLIT(POSTSCOPE, ',')) T1 WHERE BUSIMODEL = #busiModel# AND QUESTNAME = #questName#)

SELECT M.ID AS MEMBERID, M.NAME AS MEMBERNAME, '' AS POSTID, '' AS POSTNAME, m.org_department_id AS DEPTID, util_org.getDeptNameByDeptId(m.org_department_id) AS DEPTNAME FROM ORG_MEMBER m where M.STATE = 1 AND M.IS_ADMIN = 0 AND M.IS_ENABLE = 1 and m.is_deleted = 0 and m.org_department_id = #dept#
SELECT count(*) from org_member m where M.STATE = 1 AND M.IS_ADMIN = 0 AND M.IS_ENABLE = 1 and m.is_deleted = 0 and m.org_department_id = #dept#
SELECT questname, busimodel, mainmember, submember FROM vm_deptchange WHERE mainid =#id#
sqlMap.update:
update VM_DEPTPOST set id=id
mainmember = #mainmember#
submember = #submember#
WHERE questname=#questname# and busimodel = #busimodel#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT VC_ACTIVITYID as activityid,vc_businessmodel as busimodel, VC_TASKNAME as taskname,VC_EXCUTEMEMBER as excutemember , N_RECID as id FROM FG_DEPT_POST_CONFIG WHERE 1=1
VC_ACTIVITYID = #activityId#
VC_templeteId = #templeteId#
VC_TASKNAME = #taskname#
vc_businessmodel = #busimodel#

select distinct vc_fielddisplay as questname from vm_formfield where vc_formname = (SELECT NAME FROM form_definition WHERE ID= (SELECT Content_Template_id FROM ctp_content_all WHERE ID= (SELECT BODY FROM ctp_template WHERE ID=#templeteId#)))
vc_fielddisplay like #prefixFileDisplay# || '%'
vc_fielddisplay like '%' || #suffixFileDisplay#
vc_fielddisplay like '%'|| #allFileDisplay# ||'%'
SELECT cei.id AS enumid, cei.showvalue AS enumname FROM ctp_enum_item cei WHERE cei.ref_enumid in (SELECT ID FROM ctp_enum ce WHERE ce.enumname = '业务模块')
SELECT questname AS questname FROM VM_DEPTPOST WHERE busimodel = #busimodel#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO FG_DEPT_POST_CONFIG (N_RECID, VC_ACTIVITYID,VC_templeteId, VC_BUSINESSMODEL, VC_TASKNAME, VC_EXCUTEMEMBER) VALUES (#id#, #activityId#,#templeteId#, #busimodel#, #taskname#, #excutemember#)
sqlMap.delete: delete FG_DEPT_POST_CONFIG WHERE vc_activityid = #activityId# and vc_templeteid = #templeteId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT mainmember AS mainmember, submember AS submember FROM VM_DEPTPOST WHERE busimodel = #busimodel# AND questname = #questname#

SELECT T3.NAME , T3.ACTIVITYID, T3.APPID, FD.NAME as flowname,t4.vc_taskname AS taskname FROM (SELECT T2.NAME, T2.ACTIVITYID, S1.APPID FROM (SELECT T1.WORKFLOW, T1.APPID FROM WF_PROCESS_TEMPLETE T1 WHERE INSTR(T1.WORKFLOW, 'ps') > 0) S1, XMLTABLE('ps/p/n' PASSING XMLTYPE(S1.WORKFLOW) COLUMNS "NAME" VARCHAR2(50) PATH '@n', "ACTIVITYID" VARCHAR2(50) PATH '@i') T2 WHERE T2.ACTIVITYID IN (SELECT VC_ACTIVITYID FROM FG_DEPT_POST_CONFIG PMI, VM_DEPTPOST VDP WHERE PMI.VC_BUSINESSMODEL = VDP.BUSIMODEL AND PMI.VC_TASKNAME = VDP.QUESTNAME AND VDP.ID in
#idList[]#
)) T3, FORM_DEFINITION FD,FG_DEPT_POST_CONFIG t4,VM_DEPTPOST T5 WHERE T3.APPID = FD.ID AND t3.ACTIVITYID=t4.Vc_Activityid AND T5.questname = t4.VC_taskname AND T5.ID in
#idList[]#
select distinct templete_id from ctp_affair where activity_id=#activityId#
select to_char(member_id) from org_principal where login_name='unitbot'

select * from vm_deptpost where 1 = 1
questName = #name#
BUSIMODEL = #modelId#
select * from org_team where name = #postName# and is_enable = 1 and is_deleted = 0

select id,name,code,owner_id,is_enable,is_deleted,status,sort_id,org_account_id,to_char(create_time, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm') as create_date, to_char(update_time, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm') as update_time,description,creater_id,external_type from org_team where name like #postName#||'%'
sqlMap.insert: insert into org_team_copy (ID,updatetime, NAME, CODE, TYPE, OWNER_ID, IS_ENABLE, IS_DELETED, STATUS, SORT_ID, ORG_ACCOUNT_ID, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_TIME, DESCRIPTION, CREATER_ID, EXTERNAL_TYPE) values (#ID#,#UPDATETIME#,#NAME#,#CODE#,#TYPE#,#OWNER_ID#,#IS_ENABLE#,#IS_DELETED#,#STATUS#,#SORT_ID#,#ORG_ACCOUNT_ID#,#CREATE_TIME#,#UPDATE_TIME#,#DESCRIPTION#,#CREATER_ID#,#EXTERNAL_TYPE#)

insert into tb_departposition_copy(ID,updatetime, DEPT, BUSIMODEL, QUESTNAME, POSTSCOPE, MAINMEMBER, SUBMEMBER) values (#ID#,#UPDATETIME#,#DEPT#,#BUSIMODEL#,#QUESTNAME#,#POSTSCOPE#,#MAINMEMBER#,#SUBMEMBER#)
sqlMap.select: select org.objective0_id from org_relationship org where org.source_id = #sourceID# and org.type = 'Team_Member'
sqlMap.update: update vm_deptpost set DEPT = #dept#, mainmember = #mainpost#, submember = #submember#, busimodel = #busimodel#, modifydate = sysdate where id = #id#
